text.title: Banking Core — Data Residency Rules Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying banking-core-data-residency-rules must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

forbidden.pattern: PII data class without an in-jurisdiction processor.
Cross-border transfer without an SCC / adequacy decision link.
Supervisor not listed for any jurisdiction with active deposits.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key before serialising.

example.note: All required fields populated; forbidden patterns absent.
Missing the first required field — schema rejects.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
